mainText: Today's top stories: Vibecoding is becoming a deal-breaker test for software, Five Eyes intelligence alliance says frontier AI models, Getty Images strikes multi-year deal to put licensed, Sakana AI's Fugu orchestrates multiple LLMs to match, Rehumanizing global health care with agentic AI, How courts are coping with a flood, Meta hack shows there’s more to AI security, XAI fired engineer who raised alarms about Grok, Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending, Google just redesigned the search box
